meta.title: Gliso Gallery Slideshow - Folder-Based Slideshow App for Android Tablets
meta.description: Gliso Gallery Slideshow is an Android tablet-first app for turning local folders into reusable fullscreen photo and video slideshows with optional background music.
meta.keywords: Gliso Gallery Slideshow, Android tablet slideshow app, folder based slideshow Android, photo slideshow tablet app, video slideshow Android tablet, local gallery slideshow app, Android album slideshow, slideshow with music Android, fullscreen slideshow tablet, folder slideshow profile app, Android photo video viewer, Android tablet gallery app
meta.author: Deepak PK

og.title: Gliso Gallery Slideshow for Android Tablets
og.description: Create beautiful fullscreen slideshows from local folders on Android tablets with photos, videos, optional music, and reusable per-folder settings.

twitter.title: Gliso Gallery Slideshow for Android Tablets
twitter.description: A tablet-first Android slideshow app for photos, videos, and optional music using local folders you choose.

product.name: Gliso Gallery Slideshow
product.heroTitle: Gliso Gallery Slideshow - Beautiful Folder-Based Slideshows for Android Tablets
product.heroDescription: Turn your Android tablet into a polished slideshow viewer for local media. Pick a folder once, save it as a reusable profile, and replay photos, videos, and optional background music in immersive fullscreen whenever you want.

features.title: Features Built for Repeat Slideshow Use

cards.title: Folder-Based Slideshow Profiles
bullets: Choose local folders with Android's document picker
Save each selected folder as its own slideshow profile
Persist folder access so you can reopen the same media later
Rescan the folder at slideshow start so playback reflects current files

cards.title: Photos and Videos Together
bullets: Play local photos and videos together in one fullscreen slideshow
Handle image-to-image, image-to-video, video-to-image, and video-to-video transitions
Keep photos on screen for your chosen duration
Let videos play through naturally inside the same loop

cards.title: Optional Background Music
bullets: Detect supported audio files in the same selected folder
Play background music independently during the slideshow
Let videos play with their own audio when you want
Or mute video audio while background music continues

cards.title: Per-Folder Playback Settings
bullets: Store settings separately for each saved folder
Adjust photo duration in seconds
Choose sort by name ascending, name descending, date taken, or shuffle
Decide whether subfolders should be included during scanning

cards.title: Fit and Fill Display Modes
bullets: Show the full image or video inside the screen bounds
Or fill the screen with center-cropped media for a bolder look
Keep the slideshow immersive and fullscreen during playback
Keep the screen awake so longer viewing sessions are not interrupted

cards.title: Saved Folder Library
bullets: Reopen favorite folders directly from the home screen
See thumbnail stacks for faster visual recognition
View compact counts for photos, videos, audio, and saved duration
Keep recent folders ordered by the last time you opened them

cards.title: Tablet-Friendly Browsing
bullets: Search saved folders by name with case-insensitive filtering
Use a one-column list on phones and roomier grids on tablets
Get touch-friendly cards, dialogs, and controls
Quickly start a slideshow, edit settings, or remove a saved profile

cards.title: Private and Local by Design
bullets: Built around folders you explicitly choose on your device
No cloud account is required for normal slideshow use
Only the folders you grant access to can be reopened later
Works well for personal albums, event folders, and repeat viewing setups

items.title: Family Photo Albums
items.text: Turn a tablet into a relaxing viewer for vacation memories, family milestones, and everyday photo folders you want to revisit often.

items.title: Events and Celebrations
items.text: Build quick slideshows for birthdays, anniversaries, school functions, reunions, or small event tables using local media folders.

items.title: Portfolios and Creative Showcases
items.text: Present artwork, design samples, photography sets, or demo reels on a tablet with fullscreen playback and reusable folder presets.

items.title: Ambient Tablet Displays
items.text: Create a calm looping viewer for quotes, mood boards, travel shots, or mixed media collections with optional background music.

items.q: What is Gliso Gallery Slideshow?
items.a: Gliso Gallery Slideshow is a folder-based slideshow app for Android, designed especially for tablets. It turns local folders into reusable fullscreen slideshows for photos, videos, and optional background music.

items.q: Does Gliso work with local folders on my device?
items.a: Yes. You choose folders through Android's document picker, and Gliso saves permission so those folders can be reopened later without repeating setup every time.

items.q: Can I save more than one slideshow setup?
items.a: Yes. Each selected folder is saved as its own slideshow profile with its own settings, so different albums can behave differently.

items.q: Can photos and videos play in the same slideshow?
items.a: Yes. Gliso supports mixed media playback, so photos and videos can appear together in one continuous fullscreen slideshow.

items.q: Can I play music during the slideshow?
items.a: Yes. If the selected folder includes supported audio files, Gliso can use them as optional background music during playback.

items.q: Can videos play with their own sound?
items.a: Yes. You can choose whether videos use their own audio or stay muted while background music continues.

items.q: What settings can I change for each folder?
items.a: Each saved folder can keep its own photo duration, sort mode, subfolder preference, video audio behavior, and fit or fill screen mode.

items.q: Can Gliso include subfolders while scanning media?
items.a: Yes. When you add a folder, you can decide whether Gliso should scan only that folder or include its subfolders too.

items.q: Is the app good for tablets?
items.a: Yes. The home screen layout adapts to device size, using roomier grid layouts on tablets for easier browsing and repeat use.

items.q: Do I need to upload my media anywhere?
items.a: No. Gliso is built around local folders you explicitly choose, so your slideshow media can stay on your device.

howItWorks.title: Build a Reusable Slideshow in 3 Steps

steps.title: Choose a Folder
steps.text: Pick a local folder on your Android tablet, then decide whether Gliso should also include media from subfolders.

steps.title: Save Its Settings
steps.text: Set photo duration, sort order, video audio behavior, and fit or fill mode. Gliso saves those choices with that folder profile.

steps.title: Play Anytime
steps.text: Open the saved folder from your recent library and launch the slideshow again in immersive fullscreen whenever you want.

features.title: Why Tablet Users Will Like It

cards.title: Reusable Folder Profiles
bullets: Save multiple folder-based slideshow setups
Reopen favorite media collections without setting them up again

cards.title: Mixed Media Playback
bullets: Play photos and videos together in one fullscreen loop
Use smooth fade transitions for a polished viewing experience

cards.title: Optional Music Layer
bullets: Use audio files from the same folder as background music
Choose whether videos use their own sound or stay muted

cards.title: Tablet-Optimized Library
bullets: Browse saved slideshows in spacious tablet-friendly grids
Search, preview, and manage recent folders with touch-friendly controls

items.text: Turn a tablet into a relaxing viewer for vacation memories, family milestones, and everyday photo folders you want to revisit often.

items.title: Events and Celebrations
